title: ononis repens var. anisotricha
intro: Ononis repens var. anisotricha, also known as the restharrow or creeping restharrow, is a perennial plant in the legume family, native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Ononis repens var. anisotricha include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used externally for skin conditions and internally for digestive issues, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
